name: Internet-facing VM with high privileges
description: Compute instance is exposed to the public internet via external IP and has high privileges through its service account, creating an attractive target for attackers
remediation: 1. Remove external IP if not required (use Cloud NAT for egress). 2. Create dedicated service account with minimal permissions. 3. Apply OS-level hardening. 4. Enable Shielded VM features. 5. Use VPC Service Controls.
